title: askellia melanthera
intro: Askellia melanthera, also known as the mountain heliotrope or askellia, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Askellia melanthera include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, Askellia melanthera is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
